programmes.show_name: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
Funk, soul, Hi-NRG, new jack swing and house took dance in all sorts of new directions during the '80s, and Radio 1's Friday night 'Big Beat' DJ Jeff Young was there!

The decade where George Michael rapped, Sheena Easton shovelled coal and Harry Enfield became a musical genius! They're all here, along with Captain Kirk and some singing frogs.

Duncan James and his band Blue represented the UK in 2011 - coming 11th! But there have been far bigger winners and losers over 50 years - here are 2 hours of highs - and lows!

Every so often a video came along that set new high (and low) standards of dance, or kicked off an often short-lived new dance craze! Here's the '80s - dance by dance.
Bruno Brookes has stories galore from 20 of rock and pop's real game changers. Icons, rebels, activists and a few of the more unexpected heroes who reshaped music and the media.

Who better to present a definitive countdown of 80s synthpop classics than OMD frontman Andy McCluskey? From Kraftwerk, Ultravox & Gary Numan to New Order, Yazoo and Pet Shop Boys.
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
With limited chart success in the UK, we sometimes forget how huge Hall & Oates were in the early '80s - worldwide, they became the most successful duo of all time!

programmes.show_name: Make Mine A Double with Pat Sharp!
programmes.show_description: They say 2 heads are better than one & in the 80s the charts were full of collaborations. So pour a large one & have double the fun with Pat Sharp's top 40 duets.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!

programmes.show_name: 20 Big Selling US Songs of the 80s
programmes.show_description: Which singles by US acts sold more in the UK than any other in the '80s? We reveal all over two hours - you'll be surprised who's missing, and by the number 1!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
What was in the top five during the Easter holiday in the '80s? We choose three mega-hits from each year, 1980 to 1989, with Madonna, David Bowie, Bros, The Jam, Culture Club and more!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
120 videos, in order, a forgotten hit from each and every month of the '80s. Radio 1 legend Bruno Brookes is the man with the 10-hour musical plan!
